chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2584 of 2022 ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 17.08.2022 Mr. Shahzad Ahmed Narejo advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with I.O/SIP Saira Memon PS Ibrahim Hyderi, District Malir Karachi and Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. ----- Petitioner No.2 present submits that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.1 out of her own freewill. After the marriage, her father compromised with her husband and on the basis of compromise she came to visit her parents’ house where she was detained and under force and coercion, her statement u/s 164 Cr.P.C was recorded in which she has implicated petitioner No.1, her husband, of her abduction. She states that this statement is not true as she has contracted marriage with her husband with freewill. I.O. is present has recorded statement of the petitioner No.2 in court in which she has reiterated the facts stated above. I.O submits that in the light of her statement before this court and recorded by her, she would submit supplementary challan exonerating the accused. As an when such supplementary report is submitted before the trial court, it shall pass the order in the light thereof in accordance with law. Petitioner and their counsel being satisfied seek disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
